summary: Iteration 75: Close Wizard Phase 1-4 Fixes - Backend (20/20 tests PASS) and Frontend verified. All wizard steps show comprehensive data: Step 1 (Sales Log) shows ALL payment methods with badges; Step 2 (Customer Credits) shows per-invoice item breakdown with payment status; Step 4 (Expenses) groups by category; Step 5 (Actual Count) shows detailed cash breakdown; Step 7 (Z-Report) shows full Cash Drawer Reconciliation.

STEP_1_SALES_LOG.description: Sales Log shows ALL payment methods (cash, gcash, maya, split, credit) with badges
tests: API returns entries[] with all payment methods in sequential order
API returns summary.by_payment_method breakdown with total/count per method
API returns summary.total_all summing ALL entries
UI shows payment method badges (CASH, CREDIT) in table
UI header shows 'All Sales: ₱X' total with Credit/Cash breakdown

STEP_2_CUSTOMER_CREDITS.description: Customer Credits shows per-invoice item breakdown with payment status
tests: API returns credit_invoices[] with items[] array containing product details
Each invoice has grand_total, amount_paid, balance fields
UI shows customer name, invoice number, payment type
UI shows item quantities (e.g., 'VITMIN PRO POWDER (1 X 20) x1')
UI shows payment status (Paid: ₱X / FULLY PAID / Balance: ₱X)
UI shows Cash Advances & Farm Services section

STEP_4_EXPENSES.description: Expenses grouped by category with subtotals
tests: API returns expenses[] with category field
UI groups expenses by category: FARM EXPENSE, CUSTOMER CASH-OUT, PURCHASE PAYMENT
Each category shows colored header with subtotal
Each expense shows description, customer_name/employee_name, amount
Total Expenses shown at bottom

STEP_5_ACTUAL_COUNT.description: Actual Count shows detailed cash breakdown with e-wallet payments
tests: UI shows Opening Float
UI shows Cash Sales
UI shows Partial Cash Received
UI shows AR Payments
API returns digital_by_platform for GCash/Maya breakdown (tested via API)
UI shows Total Cash In = Cash Sales + Partial Cash + AR Payments
UI shows Total Expenses
UI shows Expected in Drawer

STEP_7_ZREPORT.description: Z-Report shows Cash Drawer Reconciliation with line-by-line breakdown
tests: CASH DRAWER RECONCILIATION section visible
Opening Float + Cash Sales + Partial Cash + AR Received = Total Cash In
Total Cash In - Expenses = Expected in Drawer
Actual Count field for user input
Fund Allocation: To Vault / Float Tomorrow
Credit Extended Today with invoice count + cashout/farm
Expenses section with category breakdown
Manager / Owner Sign-Off with PIN verification

MULTI_DAY_DETECTION.description: GET /api/daily-close/unclosed-days returns unclosed days for branch
tests: Returns unclosed_days[] list with dates
Each day has has_activity, sales_count, expense_count, cash_sales_total
Returns last_close_date and last_drawer_float
UI shows multi-day selector banner with unclosed days

test_categories: Daily Log by Payment Method (4 tests): entries with all methods, by_payment_method summary, total_all field, payment_method in entries
Credit Invoices with Items (2 tests): items array, payment status fields
Expenses by Category (2 tests): category field, customer/employee fields
Actual Count E-Wallet Breakdown (2 tests): digital_by_platform, cash breakdown fields
Unclosed Days Detection (3 tests): list, activity summary, last_close_date
Z-Report Data (2 tests): credit_sales_today, AR payments breakdown
Payment Method Variety (5 tests): split, gcash, maya, credit, cash all present

critical_code_review_comments: CloseWizardPage.js correctly displays payment method badges with color coding
API daily-log correctly returns all entries (not just cash) with running_total
API summary.by_payment_method provides accurate breakdown per payment type
Step 4 Expenses UI correctly groups by category with colored headers
Step 5 shows all cash breakdown fields but E-Wallet section only visible when digital_today > 0
Step 7 Z-Report shows comprehensive Cash Drawer Reconciliation section

test_credentials.test_date: 2026-02-26 (has cash, gcash, maya, split, credit entries)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing IPIL BRANCH data with diverse payment methods
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 75 verified Close Wizard Phase 1-4 fixes. All steps work correctly: Step 1 shows ALL payment methods (not just cash) with badges in sequential order; Step 2 shows credit invoices with per-item breakdown and payment status (Total/Paid/Balance); Step 4 groups expenses by category (Farm, Cash-out, Purchase Payment) with subtotals; Step 5 shows detailed cash breakdown (Opening Float, Cash Sales, AR Payments, Total Cash In, Expenses, Expected); Step 7 shows full Z-Report with Cash Drawer Reconciliation line-by-line. Multi-day unclosed detection working with activity summaries. Backend APIs return by_payment_method and total_all fields correctly. E-Wallet breakdown (digital_by_platform) visible in API and Step 5 when digital sales exist.
